title: linaria arvensis var. simplex
intro: Linaria arvensis var. simplex, commonly known as the Butter and Eggs or Yellow Toadflax, is a variety of the Linaria arvensis plant, a flowering plant belonging to the figwort family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, and has been employed in treating various health issues such as fever, bronchitis, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Linaria arvensis var. simplex include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and alleviate respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
